title: LegendaryEvents
description: This mod adds few event that spawn randomly on your smp!
body:
# **LegendaryEvents**

## Features
- Randomly spawned events
- fully configurable events, spawn ratio and drops
- Easy usage
- Useful admin commands
- /evanish
- anti-ocean event spawn (events will not spawn on ocean or water)

## Events

### Supply drop
Spawn barrel with glowing effect and timer above it and broadcast cordinates on chat.

![Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1948dae1b77a2c07f7c7d5bdb8fb8acb8aa492f1_0.webp)

### Llama
Spawn llama with glowing effect that is going to fight for its life and broadcast cordinates on chat.

![Llama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584b5989e7b35175c5c85458611126f46705cfd1.png)

### Obelisk
Summons platform with 4 crystals that you need to destroy to summon Obelisk's core but crystals and core will fight back. Do not underestimate it. Broadcast cordinates on chat.

![Crysals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5013a93f0fb1801e721f4c25475b58bef2dd4075.png)

![Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2115c51d3ab3624536dc9a274af4bad5db09740e.png)

### Shrine:
Spawn radioactive shrine in random location that have 5%(configurable) to expload in interaction. You have to give it enough offerings to get it full but be careful and don't let it expload. Broadcast cordinates on chat.

![Shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f01f2c6c4ba34ace3d38206645bfde4604843e6.png)

## Fully configurable

```
vanish: #fake leave/join messages
  fake-messages: true

settings:
  check-interval-seconds: 600
  spawn-chance-percent: 30
  spawn-range: 5000

llama:
  health: 1000
  glowing: true
  knockback-interval-seconds: 5
  true-damage: 4.0
  name: "&dEvent Llama"

barrel:
  open-after-minutes: 15


llama-loot:
  diamond_blocks:
    material: DIAMOND_BLOCK
    amount: 9
    chance: 40

  netherite:
    material: NETHERITE_INGOT
    amount: 1
    chance: 10

  ender_pearls:
    material: ENDER_PEARL
    amount: 32
    chance: 60

  shulker_box:
    material: SHULKER_BOX
    amount: 1
    chance: 25

  golden_apples:
    material: GOLDEN_APPLE
    amount: 48
    chance: 40

  notch_apple:
    material: ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE
    amount: 1
    chance: 10

  mace:
    material: MACE
    amount: 1
    chance: 10

  emerald_blocks:
    material: EMERALD_BLOCK
    amount: 32
    chance: 40

  gold_blocks:
    material: GOLD_BLOCK
    amount: 16
    chance: 25

  breeze_rods:
    material: BREEZE_ROD
    amount: 64
    chance: 40

barrel-loot:
  reward1:
    material: DIAMOND_BLOCK
    amount: 9
    chance: 20
  reward2:
    material: NETHERITE_INGOT
    amount: 1
    chance: 5
  reward3:
    material: GOLDEN_APPLE
    amount: 32
    chance: 30
  reward4:
    material: ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE
    amount: 1
    chance: 2
  reward5:
    material: EMERALD_BLOCK
    amount: 32
    chance: 40
  reward6:
    material: GOLD_BLOCK
    amount: 12
    chance: 25
  reward7:
    material: MACE
    amount: 1
    chance: 5
  reward8:
    material: BREEZE_ROD
    amount: 64
    chance: 40

obelisk:
  core:
    health: 1500
    damage: 5.0
    attack-range: 6
    interval-seconds: 6

  crystal:
    health: 150
    shockwave-damage: 2.0
    damage: 5.0
    attack-range: 4
    interval-seconds: 3

  core-loot:
    reward1:
      material: NETHERITE_INGOT
      amount: 2
      chance: 15
    reward2:
      material: DIAMOND_BLOCK
      amount: 16
      chance: 40
    reward3:
      material: EMERALD_BLOCK
      amount: 128
      chance: 35
    reward4:
      material: ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE
      amount: 3
      chance: 10
    reward5:
      material: MACE
      amount: 1
      chance: 10
    reward6:
      material: GOLDEN_APPLE
      amount: 128
      chance: 35
    reward7:
      material: SHULKER_BOX
      amount: 2
      chance: 10
    reward8:
      material: GOLD_BLOCK
      amount: 64
      chance: 30

shrine:
  timeout-minutes: 15
  click-cooldown-ms: 500
  explosion-chance-percent: 5

  offerings:
    COBWEB:
      percent: 1

    GOLD_INGOT:
      percent: 2

    EMERALD:
      percent: 3

    DIAMOND:
      percent: 5

    GOLDEN_APPLE:
      percent: 6

    WIND_CHARGE:
      percent: 7

    POTION_SPEED:
      percent: 8

    POTION_FIRE_RES:
      percent: 8

    POTION_STRENGTH:
      percent: 10

    ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE:
      percent: 15

  loot:
    reward1:
      material: DIAMOND
      amount: 32
      chance: 40

    reward2:
      material: NETHERITE_INGOT
      amount: 1
      chance: 5

    reward3:
      material: EMERALD_BLOCK
      amount: 64
      chance: 35

    reward4:
      material: ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE
      amount: 1
      chance: 8

    reward5:
      material: GOLDEN_APPLE
      amount: 64
      chance: 50
    reward6:
      material: GOLD_BLOCK
      amount: 64
      chance: 30
    reward7:
      material: MACE
      amount: 1
      chance: 10
    reward8:
      material: SHULKER_BOX
      amount: 2
      chance: 10
    reward9:
      material: BREEZE_ROD
      amount: 64
      chance: 40
```


## Commands

- /events <barrel, llama, obelisk, Shrine, random, tp, stop, reload>
- /evanish (ev)
